headline: The First Oral Cholesterol Pill Is Here. Which of These 5 Stocks Benefits Most?
summary: The FDA just approved the first once-daily oral PCSK9 pill, and five major stocks now sit in the crosshairs. Not all of them come out ahead, and the biggest surprise winner may not be the company that makes the drug.

headline: The $5.25 billion ETF paying dividends that grew three years straight right now
